title: Player controller: instant accel/decel (sole input consumer)

select.note: SELECT: S3.3; depends S3.1 COMPLETED. REQ-150 -> IN_PROGRESS (P3 sim share)

plan.note: PLAN: TUNING.runSpeed (gains consumer now, dm-0018); src/systems/PlayerControl.ts — the ONLY input consumer (dm-0019 boundary): playerVelocity.x = input.moveAxis * TUNING.runSpeed each step (instant accel/decel, REQ-150); ordered BEFORE playerPhysics. Tests: axis mapping, instant flip/stop, y untouched, purity, walk-to-wall pipeline composition + replay determinism.

anchor.note: ANCHOR: new module; boundary = System<WorldState> with step touching only world.playerVelocity.x; TUNING interface extension is additive

implement.note: IMPLEMENT: TUNING.runSpeed=8 + src/systems/PlayerControl.ts (sole input consumer, instant set-not-ramp)

verify.note: VERIFY: 147/147 green (+6: axis map, instant flip/stop, y untouched, purity/no-op identity, walk-to-wall pipeline replay, exact data-driven step distance)

integrate.note: INTEGRATE: PKG +systems/player_control node, tuning summary updated, edges both directions, pkg_hash -> s3-c9e3f1

report.note: REPORT: S3.3 -> COMPLETED; REQ-150 stays IN_PROGRESS (P9 visual share + S3.5 jump clauses); REQ-003 stays IN_PROGRESS (S3.4 instant iteration + P10)
